text: Use the questions to help you to

نوعی از سوالات که در آن باید از بین چند گزینه (A, B, C) پاسخ درست را انتخاب کرد.

text: are in the same order as the information in the recording. You will hear the answer to question 2 before you hear the information which gives you the answer to question 3.
Listen to the conversation and choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

Who are the two speakers?
A good friends
B work colleagues
C family members

What celebration are they talking about?
A a birthday party
B a graduation
C a wedding

What colour hat do baby girls wear at the event in Korea?
A black and silver
B black
C red and silver

explanation: به معنای سمبل یا نشانه چیزی بودن؛ در اینجا یعنی کیف پول نشانه چیست.

text:
A good health.

What does the baby receive from the guests?
A a candle
B some money
C some tea
Hi there, Nam! You aren't still working on your

explanation: یک پروژه یا وظیفه درسی که دانش‌آموز یا دانشجو باید انجام دهد.
توقف کوتاه‌مدت در کار یا مطالعه برای تجدید قوا.

text: . I'm looking at some photos, actually a

explanation: مراسمی که اعضای خانواده برای یک رویداد خاص دور هم جمع می‌شوند.

text: . Do you want to see them?
So, who's the cute baby in this picture here?

explanation: دختر برادر یا دختر خواهر شخص.

text: - my brother's daughter. Her name's Tae-Hee. She's one year old in this picture. It's a very important birthday in Korea - we call it 'Dol' or Doljanchi. It's a very special celebration - in fact, I think it's probably more important than a

explanation: مراسم رسمی ازدواج.
مراسمی که پس از اتمام یک دوره تحصیلی برگزار می‌شود.

text: ! And we invite all our family and friends and sometimes our neighbours. Here's a picture of the restaurant where we celebrated Tae-Hee's big day.
What a lovely place - and a beautiful garden, too.

explanation: مکانی که برای یک هدف خاص (مثل عکاسی) کاملاً مناسب است.

text: for taking photographs. Can you see me just there next to the trees?
Ah yes, I like your hat! And I like the red and silver hat Tae-Hee's wearing too. It's really pretty.

explanation: چیزی که ریشه در آداب و رسوم قدیمی یک فرهنگ دارد.

text: hat for a girl. Baby boys wear a different one - all black. It looks very serious!
That's a bit boring. Black and silver would be more interesting. What's Tae-Hee wearing round her skirt?

explanation: کیف کوچکی که معمولاً برای حمل پول یا وسایل ریز استفاده می‌شود.

text: . Boy babies wear this too. It's made of

explanation: نوعی پارچه لطیف و گران‌بها که از پیله کرم ابریشم به دست می‌آید.
ایده‌ای که اتفاقات مثبت بدون تلاش عمدی رخ می‌دهند.

text: in our culture. And she's wearing a belt too. Look - do you see? The belt means she will have a long life!
And what's this on the table there? It's very colourful.
I've never seen anything like that before. It looks like a

explanation: استعاره از چیزی که رنگ‌های بسیار متنوع و زیبایی دارد.

text: We always eat rice cakes at a baby's party. There are usually 12 different types of them on the table. Look - this rice cake is completely orange in colour and this one here is bright green!
Now, look - this is me with my brother's wife, Mi-Cha. We

translation: رابطه خوبی داشتن / با هم ساختن
explanation: داشتن یک رابطه دوستانه و صمیمی با کسی.

text: Oh, it's a little bag. All the

explanation: افرادی که به یک مهمانی یا مراسم دعوت شده‌اند.
کیف کوچکی حاوی هدایای یادگاری که به مهمانان داده می‌شود.

text: at the end of the party. And inside there's a present from the baby's parents. It's really fun to open it because you don't know what you'll get. So it could be a

explanation: وسیله‌ای مومی برای ایجاد روشنایی که اغلب به عنوان هدیه تزئینی استفاده می‌شود.

text: , or some chocolates. Guess what I got? You can see it in this next photo.
It looks like a box of tea. But shouldn't it be

explanation: وضعیتی که در آن ترتیب یا نقش‌ها دقیقاً برعکس حالت معمول است.
گرفتن چیزی که به شخص داده شده است (فرمال‌تر از get).

text: money from the guests, so in a way you're right! And actually, I've got my present right here. So, why don't we open the box right now and have a cup of tea? Then we can try to finish our assignments.
